pages.text: It’s Rahah’s birthday next week. She’s excited about inviting her new friends to her party.

blocks.text: It’s Rahah’s birthday next week. She’s excited about inviting her new friends to her party.

pages.text: “Who will you invite?” asks Mum. “You’ve only been at school a few months. The kids all seem so very different, don’t they?” “No, Mum. I have lots of new friends,” says Rahah.

blocks.text: “Who will you invite?” asks Mum. “You’ve only been at school a few months. The kids all seem so very different, don’t they?”
“No, Mum. I have lots of new friends,” says Rahah.

pages.text: “I want to invite Zerina. She wants to be a ballerina, just like me !”

blocks.text: “I want to invite Zerina. She wants to be a ballerina, just like me !”

pages.text: “Oh lovely,” says Mum. “Let’s play some dance music then.”

blocks.text: “Oh lovely,” says Mum. “Let’s play some dance music then.”

pages.text: “I hope that Sikelele can come too. He sings in the school choir, just like me .”

blocks.text: “I hope that Sikelele can come too. He sings in the school choir, just like me .”

pages.text: “Oh that’s good - we’ll all have fun singing too.”

blocks.text: “Oh that’s good - we’ll all have fun singing too.”

pages.text: “Can we invite Susheela? She’s got fluffy kittens, just like me .”

blocks.text: “Can we invite Susheela? She’s got fluffy kittens, just like me .”

pages.text: “Yes, let’s. She’ll have fun playing with our kittens too.”

blocks.text: “Yes, let’s. She’ll have fun playing with our kittens too.”

pages.text: “And we must invite Yongnam. She loves pink cupcakes even more than I do.”

blocks.text: “And we must invite Yongnam. She loves pink cupcakes even more than I do.”

pages.text: “It’s lucky I’m making cupcakes then,” says Mum. “She can have the pink ones.”

blocks.text: “It’s lucky I’m making cupcakes then,” says Mum.

pages.text: “Ah thanks, Mum! I can’t wait.” “Oh Rahah! I’m so excited to meet all your friends. They sound so special - just like you !”

blocks.text: “Oh Rahah! I’m so excited to meet all your friends. They sound so special - just like you !”

pages.text: “But what about you? You love books, don’t you… just like me! Would you like to come to my party too?”

blocks.text: “But what about you? You love books, don’t you… just like me! Would you like to come to my party too?”
